parsed.rationale: Search, because no source node is directly achievable—the only source node is any_log and nearby evidence shows only ice and water with no logs present.
Direct action: collect source-node any_log since spruce_log is evidenced nearby and no tools or dependencies are required.
Direct: any_plank is a source node and is craftable now because 3 spruce_log in inventory satisfy the any_log inputs and spruce_planks appears in craftable_items.
Direct: stick is a source node and is craftable now (in craftable_items) using any_plank per satisfied_inputs, with spruce_planks in inventory.
Direct: crafting_table is a source node and is craftable now (listed in craftable_items) with its satisfied input of 4 any_plank supported by spruce_planks in inventory.
Direct craft: the source-node wooden_pickaxe is in craftable_items and its inputs (any_plank, stick) plus crafting_table are satisfied per state and satisfied_inputs.
Direct collect: cobblestone is a source node, stone is nearby and a wooden_pickaxe (per satisfied_inputs and inventory) allows immediate mining.
Direct action: cobblestone is a source node and collectible now because stone is nearby/below and the required wooden_pickaxe tool dependency is in inventory.
Direct: furnace is a source node and is craftable now as it appears in craftable_items and we have 8 cobblestone plus a crafting_table per satisfied_inputs.
Direct craft: the source node stone_pickaxe is craftable now as shown by craftable_items and inventory (cobblestone, sticks, crafting_table) matching the satisfied_inputs.
Direct collect of source-node raw_iron since iron_ore is nearby and you have a stone_pickaxe per the satisfied tool dependency.
Direct: the source-node iron_ingot can be smelted now since inventory has raw_iron, a furnace, and spruce_planks matching the any_plank fuel per satisfied_inputs.
